description:
## Step 6 — Review the wallet reports

Three reports come with the app:

- **Wallet Balance Summary** — every active wallet, current balance, held amount, available, with totals at the bottom
- **Wallet Transaction Ledger** — drill-down ledger with filters by customer, type, date
- **Supplier Settlement Statement** — what each supplier was paid in a period, with commission deducted

Open the Wallet Balance Summary and confirm the **Total** at the bottom matches the GL balance of your *Customer Wallet Liability* account. If it ever drifts, the daily reconciliation job will email you.

**You're done.** The website integration team can now use the REST API endpoints at `/api/method/alphax_wallet.api.wallet.*` to drive top-ups, holds, captures, and releases from your customer-facing booking site.
name: Review Wallet Reports
title: Review Wallet Reports
